import torch

def rope_optimized_kernel(q, cos, sin):
    q_reshaped = q.view(*q.shape[:-1], -1, 2)
    q_even = q_reshaped[..., 0]
    q_odd = q_reshaped[..., 1]
    
    cos_reshaped = cos.view(*cos.shape[:-1], -1, 2)[..., 0]
    sin_reshaped = sin.view(*sin.shape[:-1], -1, 2)[..., 0]
    
    out_even = q_even * cos_reshaped - q_odd * sin_reshaped
    out_odd = q_even * sin_reshaped + q_odd * cos_reshaped
    
    out_reshaped = torch.stack([out_even, out_odd], dim=-1)
    return out_reshaped.view_as(q)
